ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the application */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application interacted with */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "window" TEXT /* Time window of the interaction */,
  "cross_entropy" REAL /* Cross-entropy value of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, scroll, hover) */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the interaction occurred */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., active, inactive, abandoned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_level" INTEGER /* Level of the category in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_categories" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the category was assigned to the user */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction the metric is calculated from */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., time spent, actions performed) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, count) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "pages_visited" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., home, about, contact) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)
